title: Ritchie's Betsy Ross
body:
# Betsy Ross

**is a flag mod for Minecraft.**

![Different types of flags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QHsVGyjJ/images/8f5d292779286d53d101426b183d8fdf464f8dcc.png)
 
### What's there?

- Four flag items for different uses
  - Flag block, can be placed normally or draped against the wall. The normal variant also supports certain flagpole materials; by default, iron bars, fences, and walls. Can have its image set in-world.
  - Flag Standard and Banner Standard for parades, battles, etc. Can be waved/raised.
  - Armor Banner for designating teams, factions, colors, etc. Comes with Curios (Forge/NeoForge) and Trinkets (Fabric) support.
- An Embroidery Table for setting images on the Flag Standard, Banner Standard, and Armor Banner items.

### Recipes

![Item recipies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QHsVGyjJ/images/58a0048ebcb0ff59cdc0d5ce5c41b040ca315ab7.png)

From top to bottom, left to right: Flag, Flag Standard, Banner Standard, Armor Banner, and Embroidery Table.
Any color of banner can be used.

### Dependencies

Betsy Ross depends on Immersive Paintings.

### Other FAQ:

Will older versions be supported?
Other than possibly 1.18.2, no. See above if you want to make your own backport though.

An rbasamoyai mod.
